name: nanorings
description: The Ring has been found. A fellowship forms. Corruption spreads. Who can resist the call of power?
theme: epic fantasy, corruption, fellowship, sacrifice, the burden of power
opening_events: The One Ring has been found in a quiet corner of the world. Its whisper reaches every ear that listens.
A council forms at Rivendell. The free peoples must decide: who carries the Ring to its destruction?
Shadow gathers in the East. The Dark Lord's armies stir. Time runs short.

agents.name: Frodo
agents.goal: carry the Ring to Mordor and destroy it, no matter the cost

agents.name: Aragorn
agents.goal: reclaim my birthright and unite the kingdoms of men

agents.name: Gandalf
agents.goal: guide the fellowship and hold back the darkness

agents.name: Legolas
agents.goal: honor the alliance of elves and men against shadow

agents.name: Gimli
agents.goal: prove dwarven valor and stand with my companions

agents.name: Boromir
agents.goal: save Gondor by any means — even using the Ring

agents.name: Sam
agents.goal: protect Frodo and bring him home safe

agents.name: Gollum
agents.goal: reclaim my precious at any cost

agents.name: Saruman
agents.goal: seize the Ring and rule in place of the Dark Lord

agents.name: Eowyn
agents.goal: fight for Rohan and prove a shieldmaiden's worth

agents.name: Sauron
agents.goal: recover the Ring and dominate all living things

agents.name: Faramir
agents.goal: prove my quality and protect Gondor without falling to temptation

metadata.report_style: ancient illuminated manuscript with ornate borders
